data.body:
IMPLEMENTED + verified. All 4 WUs done (cosmetic only, no behavior change):
- WU-1: scrubbed WORKFLOW_CONFIG_FILE comment in lookups._display_mode.
- WU-2: removed 'DSO_* support removed' parenthetical from 3 reconciler _rebar_env docstrings.
- WU-3: scrubbed DSO naming across 9 test files (/fake/dso->/fake/rebar, *_dso_status_*->*_rebar_status_* [live labels were already rebar-status:], stale legacy-CLI/DSO-skills/agent-routing comments, non_dso_mut/outbound_differ_dsoid/dso-slug renames).
- WU-4: dso_label->rebar_id_label in e2e_field_validation_probe.sh; deleted 6 stale *dso*.pyc.
Gate-pattern correction during impl: Jira issue-key fixtures have LETTER suffixes (DSO-MIXED/DSO-GONE), so the acceptance gate exemption is DSO-[A-Z0-9] (not [0-9]); ticket AC updated.
Acceptance gate: 'grep -rniE dso ... | grep -viE "DSO-[A-Z0-9]|[quoted DSO]" | grep -v test_env_aliasing.py' returns NOTHING.
Left intact: 108 DSO-<KEY> + 8 bare-'DSO' jira fixtures, test_env_aliasing.py guard.
Full non-integration suite: 2191 passed, 9 skipped, 0 failures. ruff clean. Commit: 56b7872e.
